name: Client portal / login entry
structure: prominent login link/button routing to a client portal
prevalence: 16% of scraped sites expose a client portal/login
visual: A prominent Login link/button (often outlined) routing to a client portal (e.g. AbaWeb).
placement: Top-right of nav, separated from the marketing CTA.
states: Hover per button spec; routes off to portal.
animation: Hover per ghost-button (fill/tint); routes away to the portal (no in-page animation).
